fields.Name: Materialization Refresh
fields.Description: Refreshes due materialized query/entity results (MJ: Materialized Results) on a cron schedule — a full rebuild into a shadow table with an atomic wrapper-view swap, so readers never see a half-populated result. No per-job configuration: the job sweeps the whole due queue (every non-disabled, scheduled materialization whose NextRefreshAt is at/before now), refreshing each via the @memberjunction/materialization engine and advancing its NextRefreshAt from its own RefreshSchedule. Per-materialization cadence lives on the MJ: Materialized Results rows; schedule this job to run at least as often as the smallest cadence.
